tagline: Improved user experience and functionality for data querying.
what_it_does: Genie Agent now features metric view display names for query results, automatic JOIN relationships when creating or updating agents via API, a new Context tab for consumers to access space descriptions and FAQs, and enhanced Agent mode capabilities including in-line thinking traces and parallel query execution for faster results.
why_it_matters: These enhancements streamline data querying for business users, reduce the need for technical expertise, and improve the overall efficiency of data interactions, leading to quicker insights and better decision-making capabilities.
plain_summary: Genie Agent has been upgraded to make data querying easier and faster for users.

capabilities.title: Metric View Display Names
capabilities.desc: Genie now uses metric view display names and formats for clearer query result tables.

capabilities.title: Automatic JOIN Relationships
capabilities.desc: The API now automatically creates JOIN relationships based on defined primary and foreign keys.

capabilities.title: Context Tab for Consumers
capabilities.desc: A new Context tab allows users with appropriate permissions to view space descriptions and common questions.

capabilities.title: Parallel Queries in Agent Mode
capabilities.desc: Agent mode now supports running queries in parallel, significantly speeding up response times.

key_takeaway: The latest Genie Agent enhancements empower users to interact with data more intuitively and efficiently.
